sharedStateObservations.description: Download command accepts model_id, --cache-dir, and --token flags
HuggingFace integration uses snapshot_download with progress display via tqdm
Models cached to ~/.cache/llm-compress/ by default, overridable via --cache-dir or LLM_COMPRESS_CACHE_DIR env var
Invalid model ID returns clear error via RepositoryNotFoundError handling
Authentication errors handled via HfHubHTTPError with 401 status check
Model metadata saved to metadata.json in model directory

reviewNotes: Download command implementation is complete and robust. Uses HuggingFace Hub's snapshot_download with proper error handling for missing models and authentication. Progress display via HuggingFace's built-in tqdm integration. Token support via --token flag or HF_TOKEN env var. Caching mechanism uses model_id with / replaced by -- for safe directory names. All test_download.py tests passing.
